Class StudentQAPage

java.lang.Object
application.StudentQAPage
public class StudentQAPage extends Object
StudentQAPage provides the interface for students to interact with the Q&A system. Students can ask questions, view questions, provide answers, and mark questions as resolved.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    private static class 
    StudentQAPage.EventRecord
    simple record for the log

      Parameters:
      primaryStage - The primary stage where the scene will be displayed.
      type - int to determine the action on load
      search - String to determine what is searched, if type is correct
